metadata.description: Admin page for managing customer reviews with CRUD modal
Admin store settings with General, Payments, Shipping tabs
Admin dashboard with date-filtered order stats and metrics
Root layout with navbar, footer, router-outlet, toast, contact FAB, loading spinner
Accessories product listing with category filters, price range, color swatches, sort
User account page with profile form, order history, address book, payment methods
Checkout page with contact info, shipping address, delivery method, order summary
Children's collection product listing with breadcrumbs and product cards
Customer profile with phone login, personal info form, order history
Full-screen campaign spotlight section with parallax background
Bento-grid category explorer with 5 categories
Reusable category section grid with title and view-all link
Featured collection section with product card grid
New arrivals product grid section
Email newsletter signup form with store branding
Promotional banner section with background image and CTA
Customer testimonials/reviews section with star ratings
Brand value propositions section: Craftsmanship, Authenticity, Sustainability
Administrative backend module for store management
Homepage feature module with hero, categories, products, and brand sections
Shopping cart feature with item management and totals
Checkout flow with contact, shipping, delivery, and order placement
User account management for profile, orders, addresses, payment methods
Accessories product listing and filtering feature
Children's collection product browsing feature
Customer profile with phone-based login and order history
Shared design tokens: ds-* CSS classes, btn, form-input, app-icon, price-display, product-card
Reusable SVG icon component used across all pages with name, size, className inputs
Reusable price display component with amount and size inputs
Reusable product card component used in product grids
Auth service for role-based access control (SuperAdmin, Staff) in admin pages
Service providing getImageUrl() helper for resolving image paths
End-to-end customer shopping flow: browse -> cart -> checkout -> order confirmation
CRUD operations for customer reviews with modal-based editing
Store configuration: branding, social links, tracking codes, payments, shipping
Management of order source pages and social media sources
Subcategory CRUD with parent category selection and image upload
Staff account management with role-based permissions and menu access control
Order statistics dashboard with date filtering, today's stats, total stats, catalog metrics
Order lifecycle: Pending -> Confirm -> Packaging -> Shipped -> Delivered, with Pathao courier integration
Hero section with auto-rotating slides, navigation arrows, progress bar, and spotlight
Category browsing components: bento grid and category section layouts
Product showcase sections: featured products and new arrivals grids
Brand-building sections: campaign spotlight, promo banner, testimonials, newsletter, why-choose-us
Phone-based customer authentication for profile access

properties.title: Home Page
properties.description: Main home page with hero slider, new arrivals section, dynamic promo banner, category sections (Menswear, Womenswear, Kidswear, Accessories), why-choose-us, testimonials, and skeleton loading states

properties.title: Custom Landing Page Builder
properties.description: Drag-and-drop landing page builder/editor with admin panel sidebar, section types (countdown, hero, product-hero, discount-cta, info-banner, product-details, trust-banner, reviews, product-select, order-form), component reordering, visibility toggles, product search/selection, and save & publish functionality

properties.title: Landing Page
properties.description: Product-focused landing page with image gallery (thumbnails + main), product info, pricing, size selection, accordion sections (Fabric & Care, Delivery & Returns), order form with autofill, city/area dropdowns, delivery method selection, quantity picker, total amount, and floating Visit Website button

properties.title: Login Page
properties.description: Admin login page with split layout (lifestyle image + form), email/username and password fields with validation, password visibility toggle, remember me checkbox, submit button with loading state, and dark mode support

properties.title: Men Breadcrumbs Component
properties.description: Breadcrumb navigation showing Home > Men > All Products

properties.title: Men Category Chips Component
properties.description: Category filter chips with active/inactive styling, support for dark mode

properties.title: Men Filters Sort Bar Component
properties.description: Filter/sort bar with Filter button, product count display (Showing X of Y), and sort dropdown with options: Newest Arrivals, Price Low to High, Price High to Low, Popularity

properties.title: Men Pagination Component
properties.description: Pagination controls with page numbers (1, 2, 3, ...), Previous/Next buttons, mobile responsive layout with simple Previous/Next links

properties.title: Men Product Grid Component
properties.description: Responsive product grid (1/2/3 columns) rendering product cards via app-product-card, with empty state message

properties.title: Men Products Page
properties.description: Men's collection page composing breadcrumbs, collection header with description (Modern elegance meets classic comfort), filters sortbar, product grid, and pagination

properties.title: Offer Details Page
properties.description: Offer details overlay/modal with badge, title, subtitle, image, price display, shareable offer link, and order form with autofill, phone/name fields, city/area dropdowns with search, address, quantity, size selector, total, and submit button

properties.title: Order Confirmation Page
properties.description: Order confirmation page with success checkmark, order number, Bengali confirmation text, tracking steps (Confirmed > Processing > Shipped > Delivered), order summary with item list, delivery details, order totals (subtotal, shipping, total paid), contact support, and print invoice button

properties.title: Orders Page
properties.description: Orders list page with order cards displaying ID, item count, status, total, and View Details link to order confirmation page, with empty state message

properties.title: Placeholder Component
properties.description: Generic placeholder section with centered title and description

properties.title: Product Details Page
properties.description: Product details page with image gallery, lightbox viewer, breadcrumb, pricing, discount badge, size selection, quantity picker, add to bag/order now/WhatsApp buttons, watching count, free shipping badge, description with accordions (Details & Composition, Shipping & Care), related products section, and size guide modal

properties.title: Product Gallery Page
properties.description: Category browsing page with sidebar navigation (categories/subcategories or offers categories), breadcrumb, responsive product grid (2/3/4 columns), size filter, skeleton loading state, and no products found empty state

properties.title: Women Breadcrumbs Component
properties.description: Breadcrumb navigation showing Home > Women

properties.title: Women Pagination Component
properties.description: Pagination with page number buttons (1, 2, 3, ..., 12), prev/next chevron buttons, and active page highlighting

properties.title: Women Product Grid Component
properties.description: Responsive product grid (1/2/3 columns) rendering product cards via app-product-card, with empty state message

properties.title: Women Sidebar Filters Component
properties.description: Sidebar with categories (with product counts) and size filter grid (XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL) with active size highlighting

properties.title: Women Toolbar Component
properties.description: Toolbar with active filters badge (SIZE: M), removable filter chips, and sort dropdown (New Arrivals, Price Low to High, Price High to Low, Popularity)

properties.title: Women Products Page
properties.description: Women's collection page composing breadcrumbs, collection header with description (Discover modest elegance), sidebar filters, toolbar, product grid, and pagination

properties.title: Footer Component
properties.description: Site footer with brand logo/description, social media links (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter), navigation columns (Legal: Shipping Policy, Terms, Privacy, Payment Policy; Information: Exchange & Refund, Size Guide, Loyalty Program, Store Locations; Company: About, Contact, Careers; Service Center: Phone, Email), accepted payments (Visa, Mastercard, bKash, Nagad, COD), and copyright bar with Privacy/Terms/Cookies links

properties.title: Landing Page Builder System
properties.description: Drag-and-drop landing page builder with admin editor panel, section reordering, visibility toggles, component types (countdown, hero, product-hero, discount-cta, info-banner, product-details, trust-banner, reviews, product-select, order-form), global settings, and save/publish flow

properties.title: Order Form System
properties.description: Shared order form pattern used across landing pages, offer details, and product pages with customer info fields (phone, name), city/area searchable dropdowns, address, quantity, size, delivery method selection, total calculation, autofill from saved data, and order submission

properties.title: Product Listing & Browsing
properties.description: Product listing pages with breadcrumbs, category/subcategory sidebar navigation, size filters, sort options (Newest, Price, Popularity), responsive product grids, pagination, and loading/empty states for both Men and Women collections plus category gallery

properties.title: Image Gallery Viewer
properties.description: Product image gallery with thumbnail strip, main image area with navigation arrows, progress bar auto-advance, lightbox overlay with full-size view, and image counter

properties.title: Order Tracking & Confirmation
properties.description: Order lifecycle tracking with visual steps (Confirmed > Processing > Shipped > Delivered), order details, delivery information, invoice printing, and contact support

properties.title: Order Autofill System
properties.description: Saved customer information autofill prompt appearing in order forms across landing pages, offer details, and product pages, asking users to apply last order details

properties.title: City/Area Searchable Dropdown
properties.description: Searchable city and area dropdown selectors with filter-as-you-type, scrollable list, and backdrop overlay to close, reused across order forms

properties.title: Admin Access & Authentication
properties.description: Admin login with email/username and password authentication, remember me, and admin editor panel for landing page builder

properties.title: Pagination Navigation
properties.description: Pagination controls with page number buttons, previous/next navigation, ellipsis for large page counts, used in both Men and Women product listings

properties.title: Site Footer Navigation
properties.description: Footer with brand info, social media links (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter), navigation columns (Legal, Information, Company, Service Center), payment methods, and copyright bar

nodes.label: NavbarComponentTemplate
nodes.summary: Responsive navigation bar with logo, search, cart badge, profile link, desktop category menu, mobile drawer, and offers link

nodes.label: AboutPageTemplate
nodes.summary: About page with hero section, brand story (Arzamart founded 2020), mission statement, core values grid, and behind-the-scenes process carousel

nodes.label: ContactPageTemplate
nodes.summary: Contact page with hero, contact info (email, phone, address), social links, contact form with validation, map section, FAQ teaser linking to /faq

nodes.label: BadgeComponentTemplate
nodes.summary: Simple badge span positioned absolute top-left with label text

nodes.label: IconButtonComponentTemplate
nodes.summary: Icon button with light and dark variants using app-icon component, circular with shadow

nodes.label: SectionHeaderComponentTemplate
nodes.summary: Section header with title, decorative accent divider line, optional routerLink to collection

nodes.label: ArzaLogoSVG
nodes.summary: ARZA brand logo SVG with stylized red (#F04A2D) letters A, R, Z, A in a geometric/modern typeface

nodes.label: TakaCurrencyIcon
nodes.summary: Bangladeshi Taka (৳) currency symbol icon: white character on teal (#0f766e) circle

nodes.label: PlaceholderImage
nodes.summary: Image asset used as placeholder, preloaded in index.html; content not available for inspection

nodes.label: LogoPNG
nodes.summary: Logo image in PNG format; content not available for inspection

nodes.label: IndexHtmlEntry
nodes.summary: Angular app entry HTML with app-root, title 'Arza Mart', preconnect/dns-prefetch to api.arzamart.com, preload placeholder.png

nodes.summary: New arrivals promotional banner image for the e-commerce API

nodes.label: SummerBannerImage
nodes.summary: Summer sale promotional banner image for the e-commerce API

nodes.label: ArzaMartBrand
nodes.summary: Arza Mart e-commerce brand selling premium fashion and lifestyle products; founded 2020; modest/timeless fashion combining tradition with contemporary style

nodes.summary: Bangladeshi Taka (BDT, ৳) currency used for product pricing throughout the e-commerce store
